message:
fix(gateway/checkpoint): populate cache on read operations

- getAgentCheckpoints(): Populate both checkpoints and agentCheckpoints
  caches when fetching from DB to avoid redundant queries
- getLatestCheckpoint(): Cache result and update agentCheckpoints list
  to include newly fetched checkpoint ID

Improves cache consistency and reduces database round trips for
repeated checkpoint operations on the same agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
